nodes.summary: Cloud cisticola（Cisticola textrix）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Cloud cisticola。

nodes.name: Cloud cisticola
nodes.summary: The cloud cisticola or tink-tink cisticola (Cisticola textrix) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in Angola, Eswatini, Lesotho, Mozambique, South Africa, and Zambia, and its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical dry lowland grassland. References External links Cloud cisticola - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
